short_text: Ish Sodhi to Munsey, Caught by Southee!! Full tosssss, long-on takes it. Munsey shakes his head in disbelief and doesn't
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Munsey, Caught by Southee!! Full tosssss, long-on takes it. Munsey shakes his head in disbelief and doesn't want to move. He thought that had to be over long-on, but he hit it flat. These leggies, they get wickets with freebies. Such a charmed life for them. Munsey moved across like the previous occasions to target the leg-side, Ish Sodhi bowled a dolly of a ball, Munsey mishit it and Southee with a brilliant bit of fielding running to his right and taking a sliding catch. Big wicket this for New Zealand.
